reviews.review_title: 🏃‍♂️⚡ Reflex Fun That Gets You Moving
reviews.review_description:
Bounce Guardian is a fun and engaging game that reminded me of Kinect Adventures, where physical movement is at the heart of the gameplay.

There are three levels to go through, and even the easy mode can be surprisingly challenging, requiring full focus and quick reactions. You’ll be moving, dodging, and hitting objects constantly, which makes it a great way to get some cardio while playing.

The execution is solid, the gameplay feels responsive, and it’s genuinely fun to jump into. The game also recently moved from Early Access to a full release, which is great to see.

If you enjoy active VR games that make you move and keep your reflexes sharp, this is a very fun one to try. 💥🎮
